name: anything-llm
description: Stop renting your intelligence. Own it with AnythingLLM. Everything you need for a powerful local-first agent experience
summaryZh: Stop renting your intelligence. Own it with AnythingLLM. Everything you need for a powerful local-first agent experience  这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。

fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
